raw_consumer_statement:
I am writing to formally reject Barclays Bank Delawares position and request CFPB supervisory review and assistance. Barclays sent me a letter from the Office of the President dated XX/XX/XXXX stating that they can not assist because I allegedly did not identify which transactions were fraudulent. That is not accurate. I have now provided an itemized list of every disputed transaction ( date, merchant, amount, and account ), exactly as shown on the statements, yet Barclays has still not resolved the fraud claim.

Barclays response appears to rely on procedural barriers instead of a reasonable investigation. I am requesting CFPBs intervention to require Barclays to ( 1 ) reopen and complete a proper investigation, ( 2 ) permanently credit the unauthorized transactions, and ( 3 ) reverse all related fees/interest and correct any negative credit reporting.

Disputed unauthorized transactions ( as shown on the statements ) : A ) Account ending XXXX ( XXXX XXXX XXXX ) Statement period XXXX : XXXX XXXX XXXXXX/XX/XXXX ( posted XX/XX/XXXX ) XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX {$22.00} XXXX XXXX  XX/XX/XXXX ( posted XX/XX/XXXX ) XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX {$1.00} XXXX XXXX XXXXXX/XX/XXXX ( posted XX/XX/XXXX ) XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX {$6800.00} XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX ( posted XX/XX/XXXX ) XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX {$6700.00} XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX ( posted XX/XX/XXXX ) XXXX, XXXX, XXXX {$4.00} B ) Account ending XXXX ( XXXX XXXX ) Statement period XXXX : XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX ( posted XX/XX/XXXX ) XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX {$6700.00} XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX ( posted XX/XX/XXXX ) XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX {$6800.00} XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX ( posted XX/XX/XXXX ) XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX {$840.00} Total disputed unauthorized purchases across both accounts : {$27000.00}. 

Fraud signals/ reasons this requires a real investigation : The same suspicious high-dollar merchant descriptor ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) appears across multiple cards/accounts in rapid succession, totaling tens of thousands of dollars.

The statements show reversals/credits later posted for these same amounts, consistent with fraud dispute / chargeback activity, yet Barclays still has not resolved the issue.

Barclays has not provided evidence supporting any denial ( e.g., card-present vs. card-not-present, chip/swipe, signed receipts, AVS/CVV results, IP/device/shipping logs for e-commerce, or any merchant documentation ).
